unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

/* Curl_client_write() sends data to the write callback(s)
The bit pattern defines to what "streams" to write to. Body and/or header. The defines are in sendf.h of course. */

function.name: Curl_client_write
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int type, const char *buf, size_t blen)

function.name: cl_reset_writer
cl_reset_reader
Curl_client_cleanup
Curl_client_reset
Curl_client_start
Curl_creader_will_rewind
Curl_creader_set_rewind

unit.comment: /* Write data using an unencoding writer stack. "nbytes" is not allowed to be 0. */

function.name: Curl_cwriter_write
Curl_cwriter_def_init
Curl_cwriter_def_write
Curl_cwriter_def_close
get_max_body_write_len

unit.comment: /* Download client writer in phase CURL_CW_PROTOCOL that * sees the "real" download body data. */

function.name: cw_download_write

unit.comment: /* RAW client writer in phase CURL_CW_RAW that * enabled tracing of raw data. */

function.name: cw_raw_write

unit.comment: /* Create an unencoding writer stage using the given handler. */

function.name: Curl_cwriter_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cwriter **pwriter, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_cwtype *cwt, Curl_cwriter_phase phase)

function.name: Curl_cwriter_free
Curl_cwriter_count
do_init_writer_stack
Curl_cwriter_add
Curl_cwriter_get_by_name
Curl_cwriter_get_by_type
Curl_cwriter_remove_by_name
Curl_creader_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *nread, bool *eos)

function.name: Curl_creader_def_init
Curl_creader_def_close
Curl_creader_def_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *nread, bool *eos)

function.name: Curl_creader_def_needs_rewind
Curl_creader_def_total_length
Curl_creader_def_resume_from
Curl_creader_def_rewind
Curl_creader_def_unpause
cr_in_init

unit.comment: /* Real client reader to installed client callbacks. */

function.name: cr_in_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pnread, bool *peos)

function.name: cr_in_needs_rewind
cr_in_total_length
cr_in_resume_from
cr_in_rewind

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_crtype cr_in = { "cr-in", cr_in_init, cr_in_read, Curl_creader_def_close, cr_in_needs_rewind, cr_in_total_length, cr_in_resume_from, cr_in_rewind, Curl_creader_def_unpause, sizeof(struct cr_in_ctx) };

function.name: Curl_creader_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_creader **preader, struct Curl_easy *data, const struct Curl_crtype *crt, Curl_creader_phase phase)

function.name: Curl_creader_free
cr_lc_init
cr_lc_close

unit.comment: /* client reader doing line end conversions. */

function.name: cr_lc_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pnread, bool *peos)

function.name: cr_lc_total_length

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_crtype cr_lc = { "cr-lineconv", cr_lc_init, cr_lc_read, cr_lc_close, Curl_creader_def_needs_rewind, cr_lc_total_length, Curl_creader_def_resume_from, Curl_creader_def_rewind, Curl_creader_def_unpause, sizeof(struct cr_lc_ctx) };

function.name: cr_lc_add
do_init_reader_stack
Curl_creader_set_fread
Curl_creader_add
Curl_creader_set
Curl_client_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *nread, bool *eos)

function.name: Curl_creader_needs_rewind
cr_null_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pnread, bool *peos)

function.name: cr_null_total_length

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_crtype cr_null = { "cr-null", Curl_creader_def_init, cr_null_read, Curl_creader_def_close, Curl_creader_def_needs_rewind, cr_null_total_length, Curl_creader_def_resume_from, Curl_creader_def_rewind, Curl_creader_def_unpause, sizeof(struct Curl_creader) };

function.name: Curl_creader_set_null
cr_buf_read
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_creader *reader, char *buf, size_t blen, size_t *pnread, bool *peos)

function.name: cr_buf_needs_rewind
cr_buf_total_length
cr_buf_resume_from

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_crtype cr_buf = { "cr-buf", Curl_creader_def_init, cr_buf_read, Curl_creader_def_close, cr_buf_needs_rewind, cr_buf_total_length, cr_buf_resume_from, Curl_creader_def_rewind, Curl_creader_def_unpause, sizeof(struct cr_buf_ctx) };

Curl_creader_total_length
Curl_creader_client_length
